subject: chemistry
title: 18N.1.SL.TZ0.24
question_html:
Which compounds cause the colour of acidified potassium manganate(VII) solution to change from purple to colourless?

I.    CH3CH2CH2CH2OH

II.   (CH3)3CCH2OH

III.  CH3CH2CH(OH)CH3

 

A.   I and II only

B.   I and III only

C.   II and III only

D.   I, II and III
